name: 10p11_pericentromeric_SD
description: 10p11.2-p11.1 pericentromeric segmental duplication pile-up immediately p-arm of the chr10 centromere. Mosaic of duplicons shared with other pericentromeres (chr2, chr5, chr9, chr22) and large intrachromosomal SDs paired with the 10q11.21-q11.22 pericentromeric block.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD modules of 10-200 kb at 95-99% identity; shared duplicons with multiple acrocentric/pericentromeric regions; assembly-uncertain.
